common.rateLimitAuth: Too many authentication attempts. Please try again later.
common.rateLimitAdmin: Too many admin engagement requests. Please try again later.

auth.login.userBlocked: Your account has been blocked. Reason: {{reason}}
auth.profile.unauthorized: You can only view your own profile
auth.passwordReset.requested: Password reset email sent if account exists
auth.passwordReset.noAccount: No account found with that email
auth.passwordReset.tokenUsed: This reset token has already been used
auth.passwordReset.sameAsOld: New password must be different from the old password
auth.passwordReset.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
auth.passwordReset.email.subject: Reset Your CrabWatch Password
auth.passwordReset.email.body.click: Click the link below to reset your password:
auth.passwordReset.email.body.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour.
auth.passwordReset.email.body.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

user.unauthorized: You can only update your own profile
user.password.notConfigured: Password login is not configured for this account
user.password.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from current password
user.password.weak: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
user.restore.expired: User has exceeded retention period and cannot be restored

observation.unauthorized: You can only update your own observations

analysis.photo.required: At least one photo is required
analysis.photo.invalidType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed
analysis.sessionInvalid: sessionId must be a valid UUID
analysis.photoUrls.required: photoUrls is required (array of blob URLs)
analysis.view.invalid: expectedView is required (dorsal, ventral, or carapace-closeup)
analysis.coin.required: Coin reference is required for size estimation
analysis.crabCount.zero: No crab detected - please retake with one crab clearly visible
analysis.crabCount.multiple: Multiple crabs detected - please photograph only one crab at a time
analysis.quality.blurFail: Photo is too blurry - please retake a sharper image
analysis.quality.brightnessFail: Photo is too dark - please retake in better lighting
analysis.coverage.warn: Crab appears too small in frame ({{coverage}}%). Move closer so the crab fills more of the image.
analysis.coverage.secondPassApplied: Applied focused crop analysis to improve species confidence.

admin.recalculation.modeInvalid: mode must be dry-run or execute
admin.xp.adjust.required: userId, deltaXP, and reason are required
admin.achievement.create.required: code, name, description, and category are required
admin.mission.create.required: code, name, description, cadence, and criteria are required
admin.season.create.required: code, name, startsAt, and endsAt are required

invite.create.emailFailed: Invite created but email failed to send
invite.create.roleInvalid: Invalid role. Must be RESEARCHER or ADMIN
invite.validate.used: Invite token has already been used
invite.emailMismatch: Email does not match the invite
invite.email.subject: You're invited to join CrabWatch!
invite.email.body.role: You have been invited to join CrabWatch as {{role}}.
invite.email.body.expiry: This invite will expire in 7 days

upload.fileRequired: file, fileName, and contentType are required
upload.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP

notification.levelUp.title: Level Up!
notification.streakWarning.title: Streak at Risk!
notification.streakWarning.body: Your {{streak}}-day streak is about to expire. Great job staying active!
notification.streakLost.title: Streak Lost
notification.streakLost.body: Your {{streak}}-day streak has ended. Submit an observation daily to build a new one!
notification.achievement.title: Achievement Unlocked!

translation.duplicate: Translation already exists for this locale/resource/field

streakWarning.title: Your streak is at risk!
streakWarning.description: You have a {{streak}}-day streak. Submit an observation today to keep it going!

milestone.title: {{remaining}} observations to {{milestone}} milestone!
milestone.description: You're {{progress}}% of the way there. Keep contributing to crab science!

diversity.title: Explore more species!
diversity.description: You've documented {{count}} species so far. Try to find different crab species to boost your diversity score!

activityDrop.title: Activity decreased this week
activityDrop.description: You submitted {{current}} observations this week vs {{previous}} last week. Get back out there!
